REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (52 Gambier Street, San Francisco, Ca 94134)
Off Calendar Nov-20-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Evyn Shomer for San Francisco Public Administrator (Petitioner).

The Court questioned if the buyers have received individual notice and the buyers are present. The Court also questioned the status of the house since 2000. Ms. Shomer reported that this case was handle by the SFPG and that the adult daughter Nancy Fitzgerald was a Conservatee living in the property with her brother and that notice of sale was sent to her Court Appointed Counsel Lawrence Siracusa. She further stated that Judge Busch has granted the termination of Nancy Fitzgerald 's conservatorship so that she and her brother can use their share of the sale proceeds to purchase a mobile home in Orville, to be closed to their sister. The Court also noted that there was a Request for Special Notice filed by Shirley Yawitz (Probate Referee).

The bid was increased to $500,000.00. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale with commission split at 50/50 (subject to review of the order). An additional bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Harris.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
